name: IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Earn 5% Fuel Points at IndianOil outlets, capped at 150 Fuel Points per month (250 Fuel Points per month for the first 6 months from card issuance).
Earn 5% Fuel Points on groceries, capped at 100 Fuel Points per month.
Earn 5% Fuel Points on bill payments and utility bills, capped at 100 Fuel Points per month.
UPI transactions on RuPay variant earn 1 Fuel Point for every Rs 150 spent (same as base rate).

exclusions: fuel transactions at non-IndianOil petrol pumps

joiningBenefitsValued.label: INR 250 worth of voucher upon card activation and completion of at least one transaction within 37 days from card issuance

joiningBenefits: INR 250 worth of voucher upon card activation and completion of at least one transaction within 37 days from card issuance
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all Indian fuel stations on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
Up to 50 days interest-free credit period

salaried: Net monthly income greater than Rs 10,000
selfEmployed: ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh per annum

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-07
Official audit completed on 2026-06-07 using HDFC Bank IndianOil product page and FAQs.
Popularity score updated to 70 per user request.
HDFC Bank charges a revised 1.75% DCC markup fee (effective 15 May 2026) on all transactions processed in INR at international locations or with merchants registered overseas.
Earn rate: 5% FP (5 FP per Rs 100 spent) on Fuel, Groceries, Utilities. Base and UPI earn 1 FP per Rs 150 spent.
Capping: Fuel capped at 150 FP/month (250 FP for first 6 months), Groceries capped at 100 FP/month, Utilities capped at 100 FP/month.
Redemption: 1 FP = 3 XRP = Rs 0.96 at participating IndianOil outlets for free fuel. 1 FP = Rs 0.20 for statement credit or catalogue products.
